features: FIGHT DANDRUFF AND MOISTURISE YOUR HAIR with our 2in1 anti-dandruff shampoo for men and women. Suitable for daily use, it provides up to 100% dandruff protection (visible flakes, with regular use)
MICROBIOME FORMULA that targets the root cause of dandruff, helping to prevent flakes and soothe the scalp
CLINICALLY PROVEN AND DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED FORMULA that is pH balanced and suitable for any hair type
RECYCLED PACKAGING recyclable bottle, made with 100% recycled plastic (excluding pump, colourants and additives)
SOFT & BEAUTIFUL HAIR this formula provides deep moisturising and refreshing sensation to your hair and scalp while leaving your hair clean & soft
description: Product Description Head & Shoulders 2in1 Classic Clean Anti Dandruff Shampoo for all hair & scalp types that works even against persistent dandruff. A daily use shampoo for both men and women, with a Microbiome Balance formula that targets the root cause of dandruff, maintaining a balanced scalp microbiome. Works both against visible and invisible dandruff by releasing 2x more protective ingredients that go in the pores to finally prevent stubborn dandruff from coming back. This 2in1 shampoo formula contains 25% more conditioning agents vs regular Head & Shoulders Shampoo and is clinically proven, dermatologically tested and a pH balanced-formula. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Glycol Distearate, Sodium Citrate, Parfum, Piroctone Olamine, Sodium Benzoate, Dimethiconol, Citric Acid, Sodium Salicylate, Dimethicone, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Hexyl Cinnamal, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Linalool, Tetrasodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide, Trideceth-10, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Benzyl Alcohol, Triethylene Glycol, Propylene Glycol, CI 42090, CI 17200 Directions 1. Wet hair thoroughly. 2. Apply shampoo to hair, creating a lather. 3. Gently massage the scalp and hair. 4. Rinse thoroughly. 5. Repeat if necessary. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes.If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Box Contains 1 x 1 litre 2-in-1 shampoo Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
